allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Bulletproof Dashboard: null-safety on charts + push settings fetch errors' -m '- MRRForecastChart: guard last.date and contributors array access *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Bulletproof store + admin repair endpoint for corrupted data' -m '- readCol\(\) : safely handles non-array values \(Jarvis broke clients KV\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Auto-repair corrupted KV data on every read' -m 'readCol\(\) now writes the recovered array back to KV automatically. *)
